dc_title_s: Hydro (Polygon and Line) Dane County, WI 2026
dc_description_s: This data represents hydrography for Dane County, Wisconsin in 2026 and includes the layers 'DANE_HYDRO_2026_LINE' and 'DANE_HYDRO_2026_POLY'.[LINE: This is a countywide hydrographic dataset that provides a comprehensive 2,400 scale representation of the hydrologic features in Dane County.POLY: This is a countywide hydrolographic dataset that provides a comprehensive 2,400 scale representation of the hydrologic features in Dane County.]
uw_supplemental_s: This is an archived copy of the data held at UW-Madison.
